what_changed: In grGreatBay_801F499C case 2, introduced a distinct local Vec3 pos2 and passed it to lb_8000B1CC and grLib_801C96F8 instead of reusing the outer pos.

smart_moves: Treated a seemingly harmless named temporary, s32 max_x, as a codegen-affecting local: removing it avoided an extra stack slot/register shuffle according to the PR body.
Used a separate Vec3 local for a nested case-specific position calculation instead of reusing an outer Vec3, aligning local lifetime/stack layout for the match.
Fixed data references by splitting symbol metadata for a .data blob into separate object/string symbols rather than compensating in C source.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For MWCC matching, introducing a named temporary for a function-call result can alter stack/register allocation; if the source operation is a direct argument expression, try folding the call into the consuming call before adding padding or other steering.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: temp s32 max_x locals forced an extra stack slot and register shuffle
raw_diff: s32 max_x locals removed and rand_range(...) folded into HSD_JObjSetTranslateX calls

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a local variable is reused across a broader scope but one case block needs a different stack/lifetime shape, a separate scoped local of the same type may be the matching source form.

raw_diff: case 2 adds Vec3 pos2 and uses &pos2 for lb_8000B1CC and grLib_801C96F8

decomp_lessons.lesson: If data references look wrong around a function match, inspect symbol boundaries: one large .data object may need to be split into separate objects/strings when symbol metadata supports the references.

accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2646 reports that s32 max_x temporaries around rand_range(...) forced an extra stack slot and register shuffle in grGreatBay_801F499C; folding rand_range(...) directly into HSD_JObjSetTranslateX in three switch cases produced the intended codegen.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider direct call expressions before retaining temp locals used only once
source_update_candidates.text: For codegen-sensitive MWCC matches, a temporary local that only stores a call result for immediate use can introduce stack/register differences. Try the likely authored direct expression form before using padding or other steering. PR #2646 provides an example with rand_range(...) folded into HSD_JObjSetTranslateX.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: max_x locals forced extra stack slot/register shuffle
raw_diff: max_x removed in grGreatBay_801F499C
source_update_candidates.reason: This may be a reusable standard-level tactic, but should be curated against existing standards to avoid overgeneralizing from one PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Symbol metadata splits can be the right fix for data-reference mismatches
source_update_candidates.text: When a large .data blob causes bad references, inspect whether symbols.txt should describe separate objects or strings instead of compensating in C. PR #2646 split grGb_803E3F6C from one 0x58 object into a 0x34 object plus three strings.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: data blob was actually four separate objects
raw_diff: symbols.txt split
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with existing section/symbol standards but may merit an example; curator should decide whether it belongs as an example rather than a new rule.
